title: Enhanced FPS (NeoForge)
description: This modpack maximizes FPS using optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, Iris, FerriteCore, and EntityCulling.
body:
## Performance First
The **Enhanced FPS** modpack is all about making Minecraft **run as smoothly as possible**. It boosts performance, shortens loading times, and helps your game feel faster. With the help of this modpack you should be able to improve your performance to the **maximum**.


### 🚀 Features

- ⚡ Better FPS and smoother gameplay
- ⏱️ Faster startup and world loading
- 🎨 Shader support and premade settings
- 🪟 Borderless fullscreen and other small improvements
- 🎮 Fully client-side and multiplayer compatible


## 🔗 Other Packs in the Enhanced Series

- **[Technically Enhanced](https://modrinth.com/modpack/technically-enhanced)**  
  Vanilla-friendly with technical mods like Litematica, Carpet, and Tweakeroo.

- **[Enhanced Quality](https://modrinth.com/modpack/enhanced-quality)**  
  Improves visuals, audio, and adds quality-of-life features.

- **[Enhanced FPS Fabric](https://modrinth.com/modpack/enhanced-fps)**  
  Fabric version of this pack.
